languages.text: "После я обманом и хитростью смог пробраться на чартистское судно, привозившее нам припасы и оборудование, и высадился на {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфоле{/g}. С тех пор я не возвращался. Все опыты, которые вы видели я проводил с одной целью — найти вариант как спасти моего дражайшего коллегу".

traits.locale_text: "После я обманом и хитростью смог пробраться на чартистское судно, привозившее нам припасы и оборудование, и высадился на {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGLossary}Футфоле{/g}. С тех пор я не возвращался. Все опыты, которые вы видели я проводил с одной целью — найти вариант как спасти моего дражайшего коллегу".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: "Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."
languages.original_text: "После я обманом и хитростью смог пробраться на чартистское судно, привозившее нам припасы и оборудование, и высадился на {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Футфоле{/g}. С тех пор я не возвращался. Все опыты, которые вы видели я проводил с одной целью — найти вариант как спасти моего дражайшего коллегу".

traits.locale_text: "Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."

"Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on Footfall. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."

"Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on Footfall. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."

languages.text: «Después, mediante engaños y astucia, logré colarme de polizón en una nave cartista que traía suministros y equipo a Amsanct. Desembarqué en {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Paso{/g} y no he vuelto a poner pie en ese planeta. Todos los experimentos que ha presenciado tenían un único propósito: encontrar el modo de salvar a mi querido colega».
languages.original_text: "Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: «Después, mediante engaños y astucia, logré colarme de polizón en una nave cartista que traía suministros y equipo a Amsanct. Desembarqué en {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Paso{/g} y no he vuelto a poner pie en ese planeta. Todos los experimentos que ha presenciado tenían un único propósito: encontrar el modo de salvar a mi querido colega».

languages.text: “之后，通过欺骗和狡诈的手段，我设法藏进了一艘给阿姆桑克特运送物资和设备的特许船。我在{g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}落脚港{/g}下了船，自那以后就再没回过阿姆桑克特。关于您见到的这些实验，我进行它们的目的只有一个——找到拯救我最亲爱同僚的方法。”
languages.original_text: "Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: “之后，通过欺骗和狡诈的手段，我设法藏进了一艘给阿姆桑克特运送物资和设备的特许船。我在{g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}落脚港{/g}下了船，自那以后就再没回过阿姆桑克特。关于您见到的这些实验，我进行它们的目的只有一个——找到拯救我最亲爱同僚的方法。”

languages.text: « Ensuite, en usant de tromperie et de ruse, j'ai réussi à monter clandestinement à bord d'un vaisseau des Cartographes venu livrer du matériel sur Amsanct. Il m'a conduit jusqu'à {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Castel{/g} et je ne suis pas retourné sur Amsanct depuis. Toutes les expériences dont vous avez été témoin, je les ai menées dans un seul et unique but : trouver le moyen de sauver mon très cher collègue. »
languages.original_text: "Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: « Ensuite, en usant de tromperie et de ruse, j'ai réussi à monter clandestinement à bord d'un vaisseau des Cartographes venu livrer du matériel sur Amsanct. Il m'a conduit jusqu'à {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Castel{/g} et je ne suis pas retourné sur Amsanct depuis. Toutes les expériences dont vous avez été témoin, je les ai menées dans un seul et unique but : trouver le moyen de sauver mon très cher collègue. »

languages.text: "Sonra aldatmaca ve kurnazlıkla Amsanct'a erzak ve ekipman taşıyan bir Haritacı gemisine gizlice binmeyi başardım. {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Binliman'da{/g} gemiden indim. O zamandan beri Amsanct'a dönmedim. Tanık olduğunuz tüm deneyleri tek bir amaç için yaptım: Pek değerli meslektaşımı kurtarmanın bir yolunu bulmak."
languages.original_text: "Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: "Sonra aldatmaca ve kurnazlıkla Amsanct'a erzak ve ekipman taşıyan bir Haritacı gemisine gizlice binmeyi başardım. {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Binliman'da{/g} gemiden indim. O zamandan beri Amsanct'a dönmedim. Tanık olduğunuz tüm deneyleri tek bir amaç için yaptım: Pek değerli meslektaşımı kurtarmanın bir yolunu bulmak."

languages.text: "Dann gelang mir durch List und Täuschung auf einem Chartistenschiff, das Vorräte und Ausrüstung nach Amsanct gebracht hatte, die Flucht. So kam ich nach {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. Ich bin seitdem nicht nach Amsanct zurückgekehrt. Alle Experimente, die Ihr gesehen habt, habe ich nur aus einem Grund durchgeführt ... um einen Weg zu finden, meinen geschätzten Kollegen zu retten."
languages.original_text: "Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: "Dann gelang mir durch List und Täuschung auf einem Chartistenschiff, das Vorräte und Ausrüstung nach Amsanct gebracht hatte, die Flucht. So kam ich nach {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. Ich bin seitdem nicht nach Amsanct zurückgekehrt. Alle Experimente, die Ihr gesehen habt, habe ich nur aus einem Grund durchgeführt ... um einen Weg zu finden, meinen geschätzten Kollegen zu retten."

languages.text: 「そして私は、欺瞞と狡知を尽くして、アムサンクトへ物資と機材を運んでいたチャーティストの船に密航することに成功した。私はフットフォールで下船した。それ以来、アムサンクトには戻っていない。君が目にした実験はすべて、ただ一つの目的のために――最愛の同僚を救う方法を見出すために行ってきたのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Then, by means of deception and cunning, I managed to stow away on a Chartist vessel that had been delivering supplies and equipment to Amsanct. I disembarked on {g|Encyclopedia:FootfallGlossary}Footfall{/g}. I have not returned to Amsanct since. All the experiments you have witnessed, I have conducted them for one purpose — to find a way to save my dearest colleague."

traits.locale_text: 「そして私は、欺瞞と狡知を尽くして、アムサンクトへ物資と機材を運んでいたチャーティストの船に密航することに成功した。私はフットフォールで下船した。それ以来、アムサンクトには戻っていない。君が目にした実験はすべて、ただ一つの目的のために――最愛の同僚を救う方法を見出すために行ってきたのだ。」
